cards.title: Emotional Maturity Helps Raise Healthier Children
cards.body: Psychologist Lindsay C Gibson's book on emotionally immature parents became a pandemic bestseller. Her new work offers advice for raising happy, healthy children by developing emotional awareness.

cards.title: Parenting Teenagers Taking A-Levels Is Helpless
cards.body: Parents of A-level students face unique frustration helping with complex subjects like chemistry. The experience reveals how little control parents have over their teenagers' academic struggles.

cards.title: Why Families Need Space to Grow
cards.body: Living apart from children and parents can cause guilt, yet healthy distance fosters growth. Love and connection remain intact even when family members live separately.

cards.title: Failure and Forgiveness Shape Fatherhood Legacy
cards.body: Fathers launching adult children should embrace their imperfections rather than hide them. This creates a more loving intergenerational legacy for the next generation.

cards.title: BFRB Treatment Works Before Child Is Ready
cards.body: Children with body-focused repetitive behaviors (BFRBs) don't need to want to stop for treatment to work. Meaningful progress happens even before willingness arrives.

cards.title: YouTube and TikTok Not Safe Enough for Kids
cards.body: Ofcom regulator warns that YouTube and TikTok lack adequate safety measures for children. Both platforms claim they have implemented protective features.

cards.title: Free Bus Trips for English Children This August
cards.body: Chancellor Rachel Reeves announced free bus passes for children in England as part of cost-of-living relief. The initiative aims to ease family expenses during summer.
